utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵間酒店，預備我嘅暑假旅行。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你暑假會去邊度旅行呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 加州卡爾斯巴德，我嘅旅程係由六月十六號到六月十九號。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，你有冇預算範圍㗎？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 有呀，我嘅預算係每晚三百蚊美金。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，你對房間設施仲有冇其他要求呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 同埋要有迷你雪櫃同埋特大雙人床。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，等我幫你查吓。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 仲要有泳池連按摩浴缸同埋健身中心。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題。請等我一陣。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我幫你搵到三個選擇：凱普雷卡爾斯巴德、希爾頓度假村同埋卡爾斯巴德海角度假村，你想唔想知多啲資料呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔使喇，就係咁多。好多謝你。再見。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你旅途愉快，再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，可唔可以幫我喺加州棕櫚泉搵間酒店呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係呀，我可以幫你喺加州棕櫚泉訂酒店。你會住幾多日呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我諗我會由聽日星期三開始住到星期六。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 會有幾多位客人同你一齊住呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 得我同我老公。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你有冇價錢上限㗎？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 大約啦，每晚一百二十蚊美金左右。我希望係呢個價位。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你有冇偏好嘅用戶評分或者酒店級別呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 酒店級別啦。其實我都唔係好清楚係咩嚟。喂，可唔可以確保有免費泊車同埋我哋想要歐陸式早餐呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你仲有冇其他偏好嘅設施呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 有呀，房間一定要有冷氣。同埋間房都應該要有特大雙人床。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇喇，我諗係咁多喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 請等一陣。我搵到兩間符合你要求嘅酒店。第一間係最佳西方棕櫚度假村，每晚總共八十八蚊美金。第二間係深谷酒店，每晚一百零六蚊美金。你鍾意邊間呀？我會幫你訂酒店同埋電郵行程俾你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，多謝你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵酒店，需要幫忙。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我需要一間喺紐約羅徹斯特嘅酒店。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我需要由一月四號到一月十號。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題，你仲有冇其他嘢可以話我知呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等我講吓有邊幾個選擇俾你揀。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 就係咁多。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 第一間係凱悅酒店。佢係一間四星級酒店。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 每晚一百一十九蚊美金。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢間酒店提供免費無線上網同熱早餐，仲有室內泳池同健身中心。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 第二間係RIT酒店及會議中心。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。第一間聽落唔錯。多謝你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢係一間三星級酒店。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 每晚八十七蚊美金。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵間酒店，預備我嘅暑假旅行。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你會去邊度度假呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佛羅里達州那不勒斯。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想搵幾多星級嘅酒店呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 四星級。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想搵啲咩設施呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 酒店要有露台同埋海景。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。你預算嘅價錢範圍係幾多呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 要三百蚊美金以下。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。等我查吓。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到一間叫「The Naples Beach Hotel & Golf Club」嘅酒店。呢間酒店係維多利亞時代嘅酒店，用當地藝術品裝飾，房間色彩繽紛，有平面電視、書枱、咖啡機、迷你雪櫃同私人露台或者陽台，仲可以望到海景。除咗有七英里私人沙灘之外，仲有網球中心、水療中心、健身中心同兩個泳池。餐飲方面，有休閒酒吧同燒烤、海鮮餐廳同埋早餐店。每晚大約二百一十二蚊美金。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 聽落好正喎。好多謝你幫忙。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他嘢幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇啦，就係咁多。好多謝你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想喺田納西州納什維爾搵間酒店。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，冇問題。你幾時入住呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想喺六月十號住到十二號。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，咁即係住兩晚啦？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，咁你今日想搵啲咩設施呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁呀，我諗我想要間豪華啲嘅酒店，因為今次係公幹，公司會俾錢，所以要四星級或者以上。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 咁我總共有四間都好貴同埋評分好高嘅。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 真係好貴呀？好啦。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁你俾一間價錢中等嘅我啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，佢叫「The Renaissance Nashville Hotel」。佢係五星入面有四點四星，有超過六百二十七個評價，每晚四百一十九蚊美金。呢間係一間高級酒店，有室內恆溫泳池、健身中心、會議室同埋燒烤餐廳。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 嘩，聽落好正喎。我一定有興趣。間酒店有冇免費泊車呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係呀，梗係有啦。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 正。有冇客房服務呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有呀，五星級客房服務。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，真係。好啦，聽落好正。我諗我會好鍾意。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，咁就搞掂晒啦。祝你公幹愉快，希望你今日過得開心。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 太好啦。好多謝你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵間酒店去我嘅暑假旅行。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。你會去邊度呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佛羅里達州那不勒斯嘅海濱，或者好近沙灘嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，你有冇預算嘅價錢範圍呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 大約每晚三百蚊美金或者以下。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有，你幾時會去呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 二零一七年六月十六號到十九號。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，有冇咩酒店偏好呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 要有高級度假村嘅感覺。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他嘢呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 四星級或以上。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，仲有冇其他呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 海景、露台、迷你雪櫃、特大雙人床、房內咖啡同埋平面電視。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔好意思，你可唔可以重複最後四樣嘢呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 迷你雪櫃、特大雙人床、房內咖啡同埋平面電視。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好，幫我訂呢間啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。我幫你搵到一間叫 Horse Tarzana 嘅酒店。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好的。多謝你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 喂。我喺棕櫚泉搵緊酒店。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵六月一號到六月八號嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 喺搵酒店嘅時候，有冇啲咩對你嚟講係最重要㗎？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，我希望每晚價錢喺一百五十到二百五十蚊美金之間。呢個都係兩位客人嘅。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我仲想要至少四星級，同埋有良好顧客評價嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想要咩房內設施呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想要套房，有迷你吧嘅。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 如果有高爾夫球俱樂部就更好啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 多謝你提供資料。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我幫你搵到個地方啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 萬豪沙漠溫泉別墅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 時尚嘅客房設有露台或庭院，並配備小廚房、平面電視同免費無線網絡。升級嘅一房同兩房套房仲有齊全廚房同獨立客廳，配備梳化床。設施包括七個泳池、健身室，仲有燒烤餐廳同池畔酒吧。客人可以享用隔離姊妹度假村嘅高爾夫球場、網球場同水療中心。泊車係免費嘅。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。咁每晚幾錢呀？好呀。聽落好正喎。可唔可以幫我訂呢間呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 每晚一百二十三蚊美金。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 聽落好正喎。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你住得愉快。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想住喺猶他州帕克城嘅萬豪峰頂守望酒店。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你可唔可以話我知日期呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 六月二十一號到二十四號。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，咁你想知啲咩呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想知酒店同餐廳嘅資料。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 有冇迷你雪櫃同電視提供呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 酒店冇餐廳，但附近有好多餐廳。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢有冇健身室、泳池、熱水浴池呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有呀，佢有健身室、泳池同熱水浴池。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 啲房冇迷你雪櫃，但有平面電視。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你住嘅話，每晚要三百七十九蚊美金。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。好多謝你幫忙。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵新奧爾良嘅酒店，唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我可以幫你呀，你想幾時入住呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想喺二零一七年二月二十四號到三月三號入住。得一個人。我想要五星級酒店，價錢方面都係。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題，你仲想搵啲咩呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 價錢喺每晚三百九十九到四百五十蚊美金之間。顧客評價要四點五分。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好，請稍等。我幫你搵到一間麗思卡爾頓酒店，每晚四百八十三蚊美金。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 聽落好完美。呢個就係我最終嘅選擇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我好開心你滿意。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我好開心呀。好多謝你幫忙。真係幫咗我好多。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題，我會send資料俾你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，請send資料俾我。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你喺新奧爾良住得愉快。遲啲見。再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 多謝你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我需要幫手喺鳳凰城搵間酒店，因為我有NCAA四強籃球賽嘅飛。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，我幫到你嘅。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我會喺四月一號住到四月三號。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我需要幫手喺鳳凰城搵間酒店，因為我有NCAA四強籃球賽嘅飛。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有冇咩特別要求呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想要兩張Queen size床，有雪櫃，酒店要有泳池，同埋要三星級或以上。仲有，每晚唔可以超過175美元。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好的，等我幫你搵吓。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到一間叫Drury In And Suites嘅酒店，距離機場淨係得四英里。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 間酒店叫咩名呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Drury酒店。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，正。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢每晚收120美元。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 啲房有廚房㗎。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁好呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他嘢幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔該晒，再見。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，我搵緊酒店。我會去加州嘅棕櫚泉。你可唔可以幫我呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你會喺邊幾日去嗰度呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 星期六朝早去，會住一個禮拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有冇其他人同你一齊去呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 淨係我自己一個。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我淨係要四星到五星級酒店，唔該。因為我會住一個禮拜，所以想住最好嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有冇咩設施你想要㗎？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想要有泳池、有酒吧嘅餐廳、免費早餐。我想要露台。仲要免費Wi-Fi，Queen size到King size嘅床，唔該。每晚都唔可以超過275美元。搵到有咩啱我要求嘅話，話我知呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唯一一間符合你要求嘅酒店係Embassy Suites La Quinta Hotel and Spa，每晚149美元。佢係一間三星級酒店，但評分有4.4星。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁呀，都OK啦。我就要呢間啦。呢次旅程好重要㗎。你可唔可以幫我訂咗佢呀，唔該？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題。我會將你嘅酒店預訂確認電郵寄俾你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該晒你呀。你真係好幫得手。拜拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 遲啲見，拜拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我要去德州嘅Lubbock。你可唔可以幫我搵間酒店房呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 可以呀，但係你邊幾日去同埋預算幾多錢呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，日子就係今個星期五十九號到星期日廿一號，即係兩晚。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 價錢方面？睇吓啦，我完全冇頭緒。我咩都得。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 幾多個人住同埋要咩尺寸嘅床呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，梗係啦。會係我太太同我。我哋需要兩張Queen size床。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 即係兩位成人同兩張Queen size床。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你可唔可以確保間房有免費Wi-Fi呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係呀，我會確保有免費Wi-Fi。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Overton Hotel每晚148美元，或者Hyatt Place每晚129美元，定係Best Western每晚117美元，你覺得點呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢啲地方有冇免費早餐㗎？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係呀，佢哋全部都有。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 哦，咁好喎。好啦。你可唔可以幫我訂最平嗰間呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Best Western已經訂咗。地址係德州Lubbock嘅4703 N Loop 289。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦。真係唔該晒你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。祝你玩得開心。
